Advanced Technical Manual.desc: A book that contains secrets of amazing technology. Use it to obtain a few Technology Points.

Ancient Civilization Core.desc: Core from technology that was lost long ago. Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

Aquatic Pal Fluids.desc: Bodily fluids taken from a Water Pal. Their high viscosity makes them a handy material.

Arrow.desc: Arrows for use with bows. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Beautiful Flower.desc: A plant that blooms colorful flowers. Can be used to make Suspicious Juice and Strange Juice.

Berry Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Red Berries. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be obtained when picking Red Berries.

Bone.desc: Bone collected from Pals. A valuable source of premium calcium.

Broncherry Meat.desc: Broncherry meat. Giant meat full of massive stores of energy. Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.

Cake.desc: A dish eaten during celebrations.  Put it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.

Caprity Meat.desc: Caprity meat. Healthy and full of nutrients. Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.

Caramel Cotton Candy.desc: Caramel cotton candy collected from Woolipop Terra. Its fluffy sweetness melts away in your mouth.

Carbon Fiber.desc: A lightweight yet sturdy material.  Used to create armor and other equipment. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Carrot.desc: A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable.  Not suitable for raw consumption.

Carrot Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Carrot. Necessary for starting a farm.

Cement.desc: Cement used for creating structures and more. Can be produced in a High Quality Workbench.

Charcoal.desc: Charcoal made from burning Wood. It can be combined with Sulfur to create Gunpowder.

Chikipi Poultry.desc: Chikipi meat. Light and easy to eat, it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.

Chromite.desc: A type of metal buried underground.  It can be detected with a Metal Detector on certain islands.

Cloth.desc: Cloth woven from Wool.  Required to create armor. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Coal.desc: Coal often found in caves and other places. Required to create high quality metal.

Copper Key.desc: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

Coralum Ore.desc: A rare ore formed over countless years  in the deep sea.  Can be retrieved from the depths with  a magnet and fishing rod.

Cotton Candy.desc: Cotton candy collected from Woolipop. Its sweetness fluffily melts away in your mouth.

Crude Oil.desc: A material that can be processed into various products. Obtained by installing a Crude Oil Extractor in an oil field.

Dark Fragment.desc: Dropped by some powerful Dark Pals.  Used as a material for crafting powerful accessories and other items.

Dazzi Cloud.desc: Cloud dropped from a Dazzi. Soft and fluffy, it is used to make clothing.

Diamond.desc: A rare gemstone that glows brilliantly. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Dog Coin.desc: A mysterious coin. Apparently there are people who collect these. A Mimog will usually have them, but for some reason, they cannot be obtained by butchering it.

Egg.desc: Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals. Chikipi produce them.

Eikthyrdeer Venison.desc: Eikthyrdeer meat. Light and lean, but rich in flavor.

Electric Organ.desc: Material obtainable from Electric Pals. It stores electricity, but requires caution when used.

Elizabee's Staff.desc: A spear made from Elizabee's staff, altered for human use. It is imbued with Elizabee's indomitable spirit.

Emerald.desc: A gemstone that glows green. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Fiber.desc: Fiber collected from trees. A material used when creating bows, etc.

Flame Organ.desc: Material obtainable from Fire Pals. Can be used to make Fire Arrow and more.

Flour.desc: Flour made from grinding Wheat. It can be used as an ingredient in making Bread.

Galeclaw Poultry.desc: Galeclaw meat. Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

Giant Pal Soul.desc: The soul left behind by a highly trained Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Gloopie Tentacle.desc: Gloopie tentacle.  Known for its springy texture and light, refined flavor.

Gold Coin.desc: Currency traded on Palpagos Island. Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

Gumoss Leaf.desc: Leaf dropped from a Gumoss. Fresh and sticky, it is used to make clothing.

Gunpowder.desc: Gunpowder used to fire ammunition. Required to make bullets.

Hallowed Bar.desc: [Tides of Terraria]  A sacred material infused with divine energy.  Can be used to create a variety of Terraria items.

Hardwood.desc: High-quality wood carefully selected from sturdy trees grown in harsh environments such as deserts, volcanic regions, and snowy mountains.

Hexolite.desc: An alloy of Chromite and Hexolite Quartz.  Used for building advanced equipment and structures. Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace.

Hexolite Quartz.desc: A rare crystal found only in Feybreak.  Over many years, Paladium has condensed and transformed, now shining with a rainbow-like glow.

High Quality Cloth.desc: High Quality Cloth woven from a large amount of Wool.  Required to create high quality armor. Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

High Quality Pal Oil.desc: High-quality oil that can be extracted from Pal. Necessary for making Polymer.

High Quality Recovery Meds.desc: Medicine that heals wounds over time. High quality; restores a lot of Health.

Honey.desc: Honey harvested from Beegarde. It's sweet and tasty.

Horn.desc: Horn collected from Pals. Used to create medicines and more.

Ice Organ.desc: Material obtainable from Ice Pals. Can be used to make Ice Mine and more.

Ingot.desc: A material required to create metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore using a furnace.

Innovative Technical Manual.desc: A book that contains secrets of cutting-edge technology. Use it to obtain Technology Points.

Jelliette Bell Flesh.desc: Jelliette's fleshy bell.  Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully chewy bite.

Jellroy Bell Flesh.desc: Jellroy's fleshy bell.  Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully plump texture.

Katress Hair.desc: Hair dropped from a Katress. Soft and supple, it is used to make clothing.

Killamari Tentacle.desc: Tentacle dropped from a Killamari. Strange in texture, it is used to make clothing.

Lamball Mutton.desc: Lamball meat. Red meat with a unique flavor. Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

Large Pal Soul.desc: A spirit left behind by a large Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Leather.desc: Leather taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material. It can be obtained from certain Pals.

Leezpunk Crest.desc: Crest dropped from a Leezpunk. Sharp and pointy, it is used to make clothing.

Lettuce Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Lettuce. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Low Grade Medical Supplies.desc: Low Grade Medical Supplies good for Sick, Sprain, and Overfull. They don't heal Health when eaten, however.

Mammorest Meat.desc: Mammorest meat. With massive size comes massive flavor. Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

Medium Pal Soul.desc: A spirit left behind by a Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Memory Wiping Medicine.desc: A potion that allows the player to reset their status points when consumed. It has no effect if consumed by a Pal.

Meteorite Fragment.desc: Fragment of a rock from outer space. Contains large amounts of Paldium Fragment, which can be extracted by placing it in a Crusher.

Milk.desc: Drink it as is, or use it in various meals. Can be milked from Mozzarina.

Mozzarina Meat.desc: Mozzarina meat. Thick, juicy and marbled. Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

Munchill Meat.desc: Munchill meat.  Has a satisfying chew that brings out layers of umami as you eat.

Mushroom.desc: A mushroom that can be eaten raw. They can be found anywhere on the island.

Mysterious Mushroom.desc: Mushrooms that are not suitable for eating raw. Eating makes one more prone to feeling hungry.

Nightstar Sand.desc: Sand that can be found in the desert at night.  Used as a material for crafting certain accessories and other items.

Onion Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Onion. Necessary for starting a farm.

Ore.desc: Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace. Can be found in caves and other places.

Pal Metal Ingot.desc: A material required to create Pal Metal weapons and armor.  Strengthened by creating an alloy incorporating Paldium.

Paldium Fragment.desc: Crystallized energy from the World Tree. Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

Penking Plume.desc: Plume dropped from a Penking. Bright and colorful, it is used to make clothing.

Plasteel.desc: Plasteel created by processing Crude Oil and metal. Can be produced in a Electric Furnace.

Polymer.desc: Polymer made from refined oil.  Required for producing various advanced items such as firearms. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Potato Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Potato. Necessary for starting a farm.

Pure Quartz.desc: Pure Quartz often found in snowy fields and similar places. Required to create Circuit Board.

Raw Dumud.desc: Dumud meat. Fatty with a rich taste. Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

Raw Kelpsea.desc: Kelpsea meat. Tender and slightly sweet. Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

Red Berries.desc: A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked. They can be found anywhere on the island.

Refined Ingot.desc: A material required to create high quality metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore and Coal using a furnace.

Reindrix Venison.desc: Reindrix meat. Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures. Takes a very long time to spoil.

Ribbuny Ribbon.desc: Ribbon dropped from a Ribbuny. Cute in color and design, it is used to make clothing.

Ruby.desc: A gemstone that glows red. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Rushoar Pork.desc: Rushoar meat. Full of the delicious flavors of wild game. Juicy and nutritious.

Sapphire.desc: A gemstone that glows blue. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Silver Key.desc: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

Skutlass Sashimi.desc: Raw slices of Skutlass.  Characterized by its supple, plump flesh. Caution is required when preparing it due to its sword-like spine.

Small Pal Soul.desc: A spirit left behind by a small Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Soralite.desc: A rare ore produced only in Sunreach. Within its host rock of overwhelming density resides a mysterious pattern and radiance.

Stone.desc: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by mining rocks.

Strange Juice.desc: Juice that greatly improves mood when consumed. Drinking it significantly increases work speed for a period of time, but significantly lowers SAN.

Sulfur.desc: Sulfur that can be found in volcanoes and such. Necessary for making Gunpowder.

Suspicious Juice.desc: Juice that improves mood when consumed. Drinking it increases work speed for a period of time, but lowers SAN.

Swee Hair.desc: Hair dropped from a Swee. Fluffy and soft, it is used to make clothing.

Thermal Core.desc: A high-temperature reaction core containing vast thermal energy. Used as a power component in advanced devices. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Tocotoco Feather.desc: Feathers dropped from a Tocotoco. Used to make clothing, as the beautifully vivid colors are quite popular.

Tomato Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Tomato. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Training Manual (XL).desc: Training manual that grants a substantial amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Venom Gland.desc: Material obtainable from poisonous Pals. Can be used to make Poison Arrow and more.

Wheat.desc: An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes. Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.

Wheat Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Wheat. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Wood.desc: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by cutting trees.

Wool.desc: Material sheared from sheep Pals. A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.
